## Quality checklist

- [ ] Code builds/starts without errors
- [ ] Lint and format checks pass
- [ ] Tests pass (existing and new)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, ADRs, etc.)
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
